response.justification: The candidate has extensive general software development experience and demonstrates proficiency in modern development practices such as TDD and CI/CD, along with some exposure to investment practices. However, they critically lack the mandatory 5-10 years of strong hands-on C++ development experience, showing only a brief 6-month period of C/C++ work. Furthermore, specific strong SQL experience with SQL Server or Oracle, and deep fixed-income domain expertise combined with robust C++ are not clearly demonstrated, which are fundamental requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive general software development experience across various technologies.
Strong understanding and application of modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Experience in full-stack development and diverse technology stacks.
concerns: Critically limited professional C++ development experience (6 months vs. 5-10 years required).
Lack of specified strong SQL experience with SQL Server or Oracle.
Insufficient explicit experience in Fixed Income or Capital Markets coupled with C++.
